A cold wallet is not connected to the internet.
HODL originated from a typo in a forum.

Staking lets you earn rewards for holding coins.

Bear markets see prices falling steadily.

Whales are holders of massive amounts of crypto.
DEX stands for Decentralized Exchange.
Layer 2 solutions make transactions faster.

Web3 is the next, decentralized internet.
A block contains transaction data and a link.
Miners are rewarded for finding valid blocks.
Crypto is legal in most countries worldwide.

Tokens live on existing blockchains.
Coins have their own independent blockchains.
Hardware wallets are the most secure.
